metadata.cycle: morning cycle (10:00 MYT) — Campaign Day 5, Campaign Period Phase 3
metadata.sentiment_convention: SIGNED -1.0 to +1.0. Negative < -0.20; Neutral -0.20 to +0.20; Positive > +0.20.
metadata.critical_threshold: Sharp shift >30% for PIR-06; Bersatu sharp-negative = [CRITICAL]; PIR-16 [CRITICAL] if hard-news corroborates 'Bersatu exit imminent?' OR 'sasar bentuk kerajaan' OR viral >50%; PIR-07 seat incumbent/leading candidate sentiment drop >20%
metadata.entity_build: SINGLE-LAYER ANALYSIS. Source: entities-20260723-0824.json (morning extraction, 08:24 MYT, 42 entities from 7 NS-relevant articles). All 42 entities analyzed. 24 new entities; 21 existing entities updated. 42 key carry-forward entities from rev28. Total tracked: 87. 38th consecutive cycle without critical-threshold crossing.
metadata.source_outlets: Utusan, Sinar Harian, Astro Awani, BHarian
metadata.cycle_assessment: MORNING-EXTRACTION CYCLE — Morning collection (06:00 MYT 23 Jul) delivered 7 files: 5 full-content articles + 1 headlines summary (14 entries) + 1 index. All NS-relevant; 0 skipped. Content dominated by post-ceramah coverage of Anwar's first NS tour (Sikamat dinner + Paroi/Senawang ceramah) and Muhyiddin's Bersatu ceramah at BGU Sikamat. 42 entities analyzed. Key developments: (1) Bersatu MB candidate STILL undecided — first time contesting under own name in NS [PIR-06 CRITICAL]; (2) Muhyiddin distances from 'sokong BN' directive: 'Saya tidak terlibat', PN 'ditinggalkan begitu sahaja' [PIR-06 — NEW fracture signal]; (3) Anwar EXPLICITLY confirms Aminuddin as MB: 'Kita ada calon, kita ada rekod' vs Bersatu MB disunity [PIR-16 — MB contrast crystallized]; (4) SARA increase announced, to be aligned with NS [PIR-16 NEW welfare narrative]; (5) New T1 candidate pledges: Bakri Sawir (PH Klawang), Jalaluddin (BN Pertang), Ahmad Faez (PH Labu). PIR-06 [CRITICAL] threshold STILL CLEAR — no Bersatu Tier-4 candidate withdrawal (38th cycle). No sharp >30% PIR-06 shift; no >20% PIR-07 seat drop; no >50% viral amplification. Dominant theme: PH confidence axis (confirmed MB + record + SARA + stability) vs Bersatu vulnerability axis (undecided MB + distances from PN + solo first-timer). Anti-racial-politics cluster emerging (Mat Sabu + Faiz Fadzil + Anwar).

extraction_analysis.assessment: MORNING-EXTRACTION CYCLE — Morning collection (06:00 MYT 23 Jul) delivered 7 files (5 full-content + 1 headlines-14 + 1 index). All 7 NS-relevant. 42 entities extracted (12 persons, 7 parties, 7 seats, 16 narratives). Smaller batch than yesterday (72 entities / 26 articles) — post-ceramah coverage. PIR-06 [CRITICAL] threshold STILL CLEAR — no Bersatu Tier-4 withdrawal (38th cycle).

new_entities.rationale: NEW entity. Menteri Pertahanan (BN/UMNO). Previously dismissed Bersatu's participation in PRN NS — triggering Muhyiddin's sharp counter: 'Bercakap macam budak-budak, macam kita ini sampah.' Khaled's dismissal is the SPARK of the Bersatu 'here to win' counter-narrative. His contemptuous dismissal exposes BN-Bersatu tension within the broader coalition dynamics. Negative — friction trigger, dismissive posture countered sharply by Bersatu president. [PRIORITY] — key PIR-06 figure in coalition friction; his dismissal triggered the 'sokong BN' distance escalation.

NEW entity. Datuk Dr. Mohd Radzi Md Jidin, Timbalan Presiden Bersatu. Chairs Bersatu manifesto committee for PRN NS. Manifesto in drafting stage — focus: ekonomi, infrastruktur, kesihatan awam, pendidikan, kebajikan rakyat. Launch expected in coming days. Neutral — actively working on manifesto but behind PH (already launched 21 Jul). Structural disadvantage: undecided MB + pending manifesto + solo. [PRIORITY] — key PIR-06 Bersatu figure; manifesto committee chair; Bersatu operational vulnerability.

NEW entity. Amanah President. At Program Jelajah Kekal Harapan NS, Pusat Bandar Senawang Taipan 2. Two narratives: (1) anti-party-hopping 'Rakyat perlu tolak politik kahwin-cerai'; (2) anti-racial politics 'Labelkan DAP jahat, untuk dapat undi'. Actively driving PH coalition narratives — anti-defection + anti-racial-politics. Positive — active campaigning, leading PH coalition messaging. [PRIORITY] — key PIR-16 narrative driver; anchors anti-racial-politics cluster.

NEW entity. Amanah. Anti-PAS narrative: 'PAS gunakan penyatuan Melayu untuk mendapatkan kuasa.' Headline-only (Sinar Harian). Part of PH's anti-racial-politics cluster — frames PAS's Malay-unity appeal as cynical power-seeking. Slightly positive — driving PH coalition counter-narrative against PAS. [none] — headline-only, routine coalition messaging.

NEW entity. PH candidate DUN Klawang (N.28, T1 seat). Pledges R&R and university for Jelebu as catalyst for economic development. Headline-only from Astro Awani. Concrete development pledge at T1 priority seat. Positive — active campaign with substantive pledges. [PRIORITY] — T1 priority seat candidate; new pledge emerging from campaign events.

NEW entity. BN candidate DUN Pertang (N.02, T1 CRITICAL seat). Pledges to make Pertang an 'hab intelek' (intellectual hub). Headline-only from Astro Awani. Positive BN campaign signal at CRITICAL derhaka-watch seat. No derhaka content today — candidate pledge is constructive. [PRIORITY] — BN candidate at CRITICAL Pertang seat; derhaka-watch per director rule.

NEW entity. PH candidate DUN Labu (N.20, T1 seat). Campaign target: engage 100 families per day. Headline-only from Astro Awani. Active ground campaign at Tier-4 monitoring seat. Yesterday: Bersatu candidate Mohamad Hanifah 'foreigner' allegation — still monitoring, NO withdrawal. Positive — active ground engagement; PIR-06 threshold still clear. [PRIORITY] — Tier-4 monitoring seat; PH active vs Bersatu sidebar.

NEW entity. Tan Sri, Treasury Secretary-General. Discussed SARA/STR increase possibility with Anwar. To be considered in Budget 2027. Background figure in SARA announcement at Senawang ceramah. Neutral — routine technical background. [none].

NEW entity. N.28, T1 priority seat. PH candidate Bakri Sawir pledges R&R and university for Jelebu as economic development catalyst. New T1 candidate pledge emerging from campaign events. Positive — concrete development pledge at priority seat. [PRIORITY] — T1 priority seat; new candidate activity.

NEW narrative. CRITICAL PIR-06 development — Muhyiddin distances from alleged directive for PN supporters to vote BN: 'Saya tidak terlibat.' PN 'ditinggalkan begitu sahaja' — does not know who made the decision. Calls situation 'agak janggal.' Bersatu contests to win, not support others. Will not intervene. SIGNALS Bersatu-PN operational fracture in NS — the Bersatu president publicly disavowing a coalition directive. [PRIORITY] — significant PIR-06 consequence-monitoring event; signals coalition operational fracture. NOT [CRITICAL] threshold-crossing (no candidate withdrawal, no formal expulsion, no sharp >30% shift). But watch: if fracture escalates to candidate-level withdrawal, would cross to [CRITICAL]. Corroborated Utusan + Sinar.

NEW narrative. Direct clash between PH/BN and Bersatu narratives. Muhyiddin counters Khaled Nordin's dismissal: 'Kita bukan main-main masuk pilihan raya ini, bukan nak kacau daun. Kita masuk untuk menang. Jangan perlekehkan kemampuan kita.' Acknowledges growing public support but warns against overconfidence. Assertive counter to 'kacau daun' dismissal — Bersatu repositioning from spoiler to serious contender. Net slightly negative — assertive but fundamentally defensive (responding to being called spoilers). [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative clash; Bersatu self-positioning.

NEW narrative. Anwar announces SARA increase in near future, to be aligned ('digabungkan/samakan') with Negeri Sembilan. Economic welfare as campaign pillar. Aminuddin credited with high public-servant bonus. STR also under consideration. Budget 2027 context. Federal-state alignment delivers benefits narrative. Announced at multiple venues (Paroi ceramah + Senawang). Corroborated Utusan + Sinar. Positive — major campaign welfare pillar, federal-state benefits. [PRIORITY] — new PIR-16 narrative, major campaign pillar. RAPID AMPLIFICATION WATCH: appeared at multiple venues in one cycle — watch for >50% volume increase in next cycle.

new_entities.entity: 'We have a candidate AND a record'
new_entities.rationale: NEW narrative. Anwar's core contrast narrative: 'Kita ada calon, kita ada rekod' vs opposition 'beberapa orang berebut, belum mampu umum lagi.' Aminuddin confirmed as MB. Deliberate narrative pairing with Bersatu's undecided MB position (same night, same Sikamat venue). PH confidence vs Bersatu vulnerability — the sharpest MB contrast crystallized. Strongly positive — PH's strongest contrast narrative. [PRIORITY] — core PIR-16 contrast narrative; crystallized. RAPID AMPLIFICATION WATCH: deliberate pairing at multiple venues — watch for propagation.

NEW narrative. Anwar at Paroi ceramah: leaders must stop rasuah, salah guna kuasa, 'sakau' (abuse). Treat state assets as public not private property. Stop taking wealth abroad. Integrity messaging as governance-vs-opposition contrast. Positive — integrity/governance narrative. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 governance narrative; connects to prior govt-assets controversy (carried from yesterday).

NEW narrative. Anwar accuses opposition of 'tebuk atap' (breaking in early) — attempted to topple NS government earlier not due to administrative weakness but because their preferred MB candidate was not chosen. Frames opposition as power-grabbing, not policy-driven. Slightly positive — effective PH attack on opposition motivation. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 attack narrative; frames opposition as power-hungry.

NEW narrative. Mat Sabu at Jelajah Kekal Harapan Senawang: 'Rakyat perlu tolak politik kahwin-cerai.' Anti-party-hopping narrative targeting Bersatu/defector framing. Coalition-stability messaging within PH framework. Slightly positive — coalition stability, anti-defection. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative; targets Bersatu/defectors.

NEW narrative. Mat Sabu counters racial-politics tactic: 'Labelkan DAP jahat, untuk dapat undi' — opponents label DAP as evil to harvest Malay votes. Anti-racial-politics narrative within PH coalition. Part of coordinated anti-racial-politics cluster (Mat Sabu + Faiz Fadzil + Anwar 'boneka DAP' defense). Slightly positive — PH countering racial framing. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative; anti-racial-politics cluster.

NEW narrative. Anwar defends MB Aminuddin against 'boneka DAP' (DAP puppet) accusations at NS ceramah. Counter-narrative to opposition's racial-framing of PH MB. Pairs with Mat Sabu's 'labelkan DAP jahat' narrative. Slightly positive — defending MB against racial framing. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative; anti-racial-politics cluster.

NEW narrative. Faiz Fadzil (Amanah): 'PAS gunakan penyatuan Melayu untuk mendapatkan kuasa.' Anti-PAS narrative framing PAS's Malay-unity appeal as cynical power-seeking. Continues yesterday's Hadi 'two-mode strategy' analysis — PH countering PAS's racial-unity messaging. Negative for PAS — cynical power-seeking framing. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative; PH counter to PAS strategy.

NEW narrative. Anwar at Sikamat: 'Jawatan Menteri Besar bukan rebutan.' Reframes MB position as settled (Aminuddin confirmed) vs opposition's internal scramble. Pairs directly with 'We have a candidate AND a record' narrative. Positive — MB settled, stability, confidence. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative; pairs with core MB contrast.

NEW narrative. Bersatu NS manifesto in drafting stage, chaired by Radzi Jidin (Timbalan Presiden). Focus: ekonomi, infrastruktur, kesihatan awam, pendidikan, kebajikan rakyat. Launch expected in coming days. Contrasts with already-launched PH manifesto (21 Jul). No new manifesto launch this cycle — narrative FADING. Negative — behind PH, no launch, undecided MB compounds vulnerability. Trend declining (fading — no progress). [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative; Bersatu structural vulnerability.

NEW narrative. PN denies claim that weekend holidays would change if they win mandate to govern with BN — categorised as 'fitnah' (slander). Coalition-dynamics narrative rebutting PH-linked attack. Defensive posture — PN rebutting an attack rather than advancing its own narrative. Slightly negative — defensive rebuttal. [PRIORITY] — PIR-06 coalition-dynamics narrative. Headline-only (BHarian).

NEW narrative. Anwar at Senawang: 'Kerajaan Perpaduan kekal stabil.' Stability-as-governance narrative linking federal unity-government strength to NS PH continuity. Economic-investment-confidence framing. Positive — stability, governance, economic confidence. [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 narrative; stability-as-governance.

NEW narrative. Fahmi Fadzil (Comms Minister) calls for authorities to take action on 'kes khianat' (acts of betrayal/sabotage) during campaign. Campaign-incident narrative — potential vandalism/poster-removal escalation. Negative — campaign integrity concern. Trend declining (potential escalation — watch for further incidents). [PRIORITY] — PIR-07 campaign-incident narrative; potential escalation. Headline-only (BHarian).

updated_entities.rationale: rev28 -0.95 declining [CRITICAL]. Today: Bersatu President at BGU Sikamat ceramah. Counters Khaled Nordin's dismissal: 'Bukan nak kacau daun, kita masuk untuk menang.' Score -0.95→-0.95 (stable at floor — already at maximum negative; 'sokong BN' distance adds new fracture dimension but score cannot decline further). Trend declining (new fracture signal). [CRITICAL] — existing. NOT a sharp >30% shift (0% change). No withdrawal, no formal expulsion.

EXPLICITLY confirmed Aminuddin as MB: 'Kita ada calon, kita ada rekod.' Announced SARA increase aligned with NS. Defended Aminuddin vs 'boneka DAP.' Anti-corruption/anti-sakau messaging. 'Tebuk atap' accusation against opposition. Multiple positive signals — confirmed MB, federal-state benefits, integrity messaging, stability. Score +0.35→+0.38 (improving — MB confirmed, SARA announced, multiple venues, comprehensive campaign messaging). [PRIORITY] — PM campaign momentum building.

rev28 +0.50 declining. Today: EXPLICITLY confirmed by Anwar as MB: 'Dengan izin Allah beliau akan terus menjadi Menteri Besar.' Anwar urges voters to evaluate his service record at Sikamat + Ampangan. Credited with high bonus to NS public servants (SARA article). PH manifesto implementation: 'Tidak hanya berjanji, dibuktikan dengan pelaksanaan.' Defended against 'boneka DAP.' Reverses declining trend from yesterday (unity-govt friction + Linggi at-risk) — explicit confirmation + record-defense + SARA credit. Score +0.50→+0.52 (improving — MB explicitly confirmed, record defended, federal-state benefits). [PRIORITY] — MB confirmed; reverses declining trend.

rev28 +0.34 stable (PIR-16). Today recast PIR-07: Comms Minister calls for authorities to take action on campaign sabotage/vandalism ('kes khianat sepanjang kempen'). Headline-only from BHarian. Score +0.34→+0.34 (stable — campaign sabotage call does not affect personal sentiment). Recast PIR-07 per today's campaign-incident framing. [PRIORITY] — campaign sabotage narrative could escalate.

rev28 -0.95 declining [CRITICAL]. Today: CRITICAL — contesting SOLO under own name in NS for first time. MB candidate STILL UNDECIDED. Manifesto still pending (Radzi Jidin committee). 'Here to win, not spoil' counter to Khaled dismissal. Distances from 'sokong BN' directive. No Tier-4 candidate withdrawal reported. All negative indicators reinforced. Score -0.95→-0.95 (stable at floor — already at maximum negative; 'sokong BN' distance + MB undecided adds pressure but score cannot decline further). Trend declining (continues — new fracture signal). [CRITICAL] — existing. PIR-06 threshold STILL CLEAR (38th cycle). Bersatu sharp-negative alert is pre-existing; marginal structural deepening, NOT a fresh sharp-negative signal.

rev28 +0.25 stable. Today: Muhyiddin says PN 'ditinggalkan begitu sahaja' re 'sokong BN' directive — does not know who made the decision. Operating independently of Bersatu in NS context. Denies weekend holiday change as 'fitnah.' The 'ditinggalkan' framing signals PN being marginalized within the coalition arrangement. Score +0.25→+0.15 (declining — Muhyiddin says PN 'ditinggalkan'; Bersatu-PN fracture signal). Trend stable→declining. [PRIORITY] — PIR-06 coalition entity; fracture signal.

rev28 +0.30 stable. Today: confirmed MB candidate (Aminuddin). Manifesto implementation narrative: 'Tidak hanya berjanji, dibuktikan dengan pelaksanaan.' Multiple positive signals — confirmed MB, manifesto implementation, federal-state benefits, stability. Score +0.30→+0.35 (improving — MB confirmed, SARA, stability, implementation record). rev28 +0.20 stable. Today: context of 'sokong BN' directive that Muhyiddin disavows. Khaled Nordin (BN/UMNO) dismissed Bersatu — triggering sharp exchange. Mixed: 'sokong BN' directive disavowed by Bersatu (fracture) + Khaled-Bersatu friction + BN candidate pledge (positive). Score +0.20→+0.18 (marginal decline — 'sokong BN' disavowed, Khaled-Bersatu friction offset by Pertang pledge). [PRIORITY] — central PIR-06 entity; coalition friction.

rev28 +0.25 stable (PIR-06). Today recast PIR-16: accused of using 'penyatuan Melayu' (Malay unity) tactic to gain power — per Faiz Fadzil (Amanah) anti-PAS narrative. Continues yesterday's Hadi 'two-mode strategy' framing but now under PH counter-attack. Score +0.25→+0.15 (declining — attacked by Amanah for cynical 'penyatuan Melayu' tactic). [PRIORITY] — PIR-16 entity; PH counter-narrative active.

rev28 -0.20 stable (PIR-06). DAP as campaign foil/boogeyman in NS Malay-majority seats. PH actively countering DAP-labeling/boogeyman narrative. Score -0.20→-0.18 (improving — PH coalition countering DAP-labeling narrative). Driving anti-party-hopping and anti-racial-politics narratives within PH coalition framework. Actively campaigning with PH coalition narratives. Direct PH-vs-Bersatu narrative clash venue. Anwar's event confirmed MB (positive for PH); Muhyiddin's event showed MB undecided (negative for Bersatu). PH advantage crystallized at this CRITICAL seat. Score +0.12→+0.15 (improving — Anwar confirmed MB, PH advantage at clash venue). [CRITICAL] — existing; N.13 is CRITICAL seat. Anwar campaign = positive but vote-transfer risk persists.

Confirms Bersatu-PN split consequence: independent operation. MB undecided adds NEW vulnerability dimension to the solo campaign narrative. The Bersatu president publicly disavowing a coalition directive. Fracture confirmed but not escalating beyond existing structural level. carry_forward_entities.entity: PIR-06 [CRITICAL] threshold — STILL CLEAR (no Tier-4 withdrawal)
carry_forward_entities.rationale: THRESHOLD MONITORING — [CRITICAL] NOT CROSSED (38th cycle). No Bersatu candidate withdrawal in NS Tier-4 seats. Bersatu's 24 solo-logo candidates remain STABLE. Labu (Tier-4) PH candidate Ahmad Faez active (100 families/day); Bersatu's Mohamad Hanifah 'foreigner' allegation — NO withdrawal. The 'sokong BN' directive distance is a coalition fracture signal, NOT a Tier-4 candidate withdrawal event. No PN-MT expulsion, no Kiandee quorum escalation, no RoS action. [none] — threshold clear.

entity_sentiment_snapshot.entity: 'We have a candidate AND a record'
sasar bentuk kerajaan (Bersatu solo) / Bersatu solo campaign MB undecided
Anwar first NS campaign tour (Wed 22 Jul)
PIR-06 [CRITICAL] threshold — STILL CLEAR (no Tier-4 withdrawal)

pir_06_critical.assessment: NOT CROSSED (38th cycle). No formal PN-MT expulsion notice. No Bersatu candidate withdrawal (24 solo-logo candidates STABLE). No Kiandee quorum escalation. No 'lebih hebat' formalization. No RoS action. BN-PN cooperation (without Bersatu) remains operational from yesterday's Tampin confirmation. NEW this cycle: Muhyiddin's 'sokong BN' directive distance ('Saya tidak terlibat', PN 'ditinggalkan') is a Bersatu-PN operational FRACTURE signal — BUT it is NOT a candidate-withdrawal event, NOT a formal expulsion, and does NOT cross the threshold. Bersatu sharp-negative alert is pre-existing (stable at -0.95 critical); 'sokong BN' distance is marginal structural deepening, not a fresh sharp-negative shift.
pir_06_critical.sharp_shift_details: No PIR-06 entity shows >30% change. Muhyiddin -0.95→-0.95 (0%); Bersatu -0.95→-0.95 (0%); PN +0.25→+0.15 (40% — but this is a DECLINE from positive, not a sharp-negative shift for a coalition entity; PN remains positive); Bersatu-PN fracture -0.92→-0.92 (0%); 'sokong BN' directive distance is NEW (no prior baseline to measure shift). The PN decline from +0.25 to +0.15 is 40% in magnitude but is a marginal numerical shift (0.10 points) reflecting the 'ditinggalkan' framing, not a structural threshold event.

pir_16_critical.assessment: NOT CROSSED (38th cycle). No hard-news corroboration of 'Bersatu exit imminent?' — 'sokong BN' distance is an operational fracture, not an exit signal; 24 solo candidates STABLE. No hard-news corroboration of 'sasar bentuk kerajaan' — PH 36 solo structurally confirmed; Aminuddin MB explicitly confirmed. Govt-assets + pecat-menteri controversy (yesterday's dominant thread) NOT surfaced in today's smaller post-ceramah batch — may be fading. Today's dominant PIR-16 theme: PH confidence axis (confirmed MB + record + SARA + stability) vs Bersatu vulnerability axis (undecided MB + distances from PN + solo). Anti-racial-politics cluster emerging (Mat Sabu + Faiz Fadzil + Anwar). SARA increase and 'We have a candidate AND a record' are NEW narratives with strong initial presence at multiple venues — watch for >50% amplification next cycle.
pir_16_critical.viral_amplification_details: No EXISTING narrative shows >50% volume increase. SARA increase (2 outlets, multiple venues) and 'We have a candidate AND a record' (1 outlet, multiple venues) are NEW narratives with strong initial corroboration but cannot be measured for >50% increase (no prior baseline). Govt-assets controversy (carried, 4 outlets yesterday) not surfaced today — no amplification. 'We have a candidate AND a record' + 'MB bukan rebutan' + 'SARA increase' form a coordinated PH confidence cluster appearing at multiple venues — watch for amplification.

pir_07_critical.assessment: No incumbent/leading candidate sentiment drop >20% detected this cycle. DUN Linggi (N.32) NOT surfaced today — carry forward at +0.18 declining (cumulative 35.7% flagged; this cycle no change). DUN Sikamat (N.13) +0.12→+0.15 = IMPROVEMENT (Anwar confirmed MB). DUN Paroi (N.25) +0.10→+0.15 = IMPROVEMENT (SARA + ceramah). DUN Ampangan (N.14) +0.05→+0.08 = IMPROVEMENT (PM attention). N.02 Pertang -0.08→-0.05 = IMPROVEMENT (BN candidate pledge, no derhaka). DUN Labu -0.15→-0.08 = IMPROVEMENT (PH active ground campaign, no withdrawal). Aminuddin Harun +0.50→+0.52 = IMPROVEMENT (MB confirmed). No defector-framing intensification at N.14. Derhaka at Pertang NOT intensifying — BN candidate pledge is constructive.
pir_07_critical.seat_drop_alert: DUN Linggi (N.32) cumulative +0.28→+0.18 = 35.7% decline across two cycles — flagged for priority monitoring. NOT surfaced today (no new content). MB's flagship challenge seat (CRITICAL). At-risk from vote-transfer analysis + prior unity-govt friction. Monitor at BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi venue).

next_cycle_watch: BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi N.32 CRITICAL + Pertang N.02 CRITICAL) — next major PIR-07 milestone; BN-PN joint or BN-only framing? 50k jobs vs 30k jobs. Linggi cumulative 35.7% decline — does Aminuddin's at-risk trajectory continue at the launch venue?
'Sokong BN' directive distance escalation — does Muhyiddin's disavowal produce any formal coalition response? Does any Bersatu candidate withdraw? Watch for PIR-06 [CRITICAL] threshold crossing.
SARA increase + 'We have a candidate AND a record' amplification — do these NEW narratives propagate beyond today's outlets? Watch for >50% volume increase (PIR-16 viral threshold).

Bersatu manifesto launch — Radzi Jidin committee drafting; launch expected 'in coming days'. Does it offset the MB-undecided + solo vulnerability? Contrast with PH's 'dibuktikan dengan pelaksanaan' implementation narrative.

Anti-racial-politics cluster propagation — Mat Sabu (DAP labeling) + Faiz Fadzil (PAS Malay unity) + Anwar (boneka DAP defense). Does this coordinated PH counter-narrative amplify? Does PAS/BN respond?
Govt-assets + pecat-menteri controversy — did it fade or just not captured in today's smaller batch? Watch for resurfacing at BN manifesto launch.
Campaign sabotage escalation — Fahmi Fadzil's 'kes khianat' call. Do vandalism/poster-removal incidents escalate? PIR-07 campaign-incident watch.
DUN Linggi (N.32) at BN manifesto launch — the flagship challenge seat hosts BN's manifesto launch. Does BN-PN joint framing help or hurt? Does Aminuddin appear?
Bersatu-PN operational fracture trajectory — does the 'sokong BN' distance escalate beyond rhetoric to candidate-level action? Any Tier-4 withdrawal?
Sri Tanjung (N.33) independent Islah charge — does Section 233 charge materialize? Impact on 5-cornered fight dynamics.
